name: metrifi
description: The MetriFi plugin: one MetriFi sign-in to the MCP gateway (Site Builder now; GEO and more as they go live) plus the MetriFi site-design skills — generate-claude-design-system, generate-claude-design-page, and page-design-process. Self-contained: no other plugins needed. Design and edit conversion-optimized credit-union and bank websites the MetriFi way.
